metadata.name: Sakura-Tribe Elder — sacrifice to search for basic land
metadata.description: p1 has Sakura-Tribe Elder on the battlefield and two basic lands in library (Forest, Island). p1 activates the Elder's ability (sacrifice Sakura-Tribe Elder: search library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle). Engine resolves SearchLibrary deterministically (minimum ObjectId = Forest). Tests sacrifice-cost activation, library search, tapped ETB, and shuffle.
metadata.generation_notes: Sakura-Tribe Elder oracle: 'Sacrifice Sakura-Tribe Elder: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.' CR 602.2: Activated ability, cost is sacrifice self. CR 605.5: Not a mana ability — goes on the stack. Engine picks minimum ObjectId matching basic_land_filter(); Forest is placed first in library (lower ObjectId). After resolution: STE in graveyard, Forest on battlefield tapped, Island still in library, stack empty. search_library action is a documentation marker (CR 701.19a) — no Command issued.

script.step_note: p1 sacrifices Sakura-Tribe Elder to search for a basic land.

actions.description: Initial: Sakura-Tribe Elder on battlefield, Forest and Island in library

actions.note: p1 sacrifices Sakura-Tribe Elder as cost. Activated ability (SearchLibrary + Shuffle) goes on the stack (CR 605.5: not a mana ability).

actions.description: Ability on stack; Sakura-Tribe Elder sacrificed to graveyard
actions.note: Cost paid: STE in graveyard. Ability on stack.
Both players pass priority — ability resolves.

resolution.note: Engine picks minimum ObjectId matching basic land filter — Forest.

actions.note: Ability resolves: Forest enters tapped; library shuffled.
Documentation marker: engine already put Forest onto the battlefield. No Command issued (M10 will add Command::SelectLibraryCard).

actions.description: After resolution: STE in graveyard, Forest on battlefield (tapped), Island in library, stack empty
actions.note: Forest on battlefield (tapped); Island remains in library after shuffle.
